releaseArchive.sha256Note: Final archive SHA-256 is intentionally reported outside this in-archive file to avoid self-referential hash drift.

changes.change: scripts/run-node-test-files.mjs now supports --jobs <n|auto>, defaults to bounded auto-parallel jobs, and preserves a serial lane for mutation-sensitive proof/npm-pack contract files.
scripts/check-node-syntax.mjs now auto-discovers JS/MJS files and checks them with bounded auto-parallel workers; MCPACE_NODE_SYNTAX_JOBS or --jobs 1 can cap/serialize it.
src/resources.rs now exposes bounded environment override knobs for HTTP connection limits, body/time budgets, dashboard cache windows, upstream workers, and session-pool sizing.
packageManager and supporting docs/workflows moved to npm@11.13.0; Node 22/24 and Rust 1.95.0 remain the project policy.
release-manifest.json now includes a curated report set instead of the entire historical reports directory; obsolete bulky smoke/sweep reports were pruned from the optimized tree.
README/docs/source-quality/test-strategy/verification docs now describe the new resource knobs and bounded auto-parallel lanes.

validation.evidence: 3/3 npm CLI test files passed; parallel jobs=3
79 subtests passed across archive, boot, product-practice, runtime-performance, source-quality, release, evidence, packaging, proof, and npm-pack contract files
rustfmt check completed with exit code 0
sandbox DNS could not resolve index.crates.io while fetching auto-launch dependency
